ocr_reason: Dense bullet text and a central architecture diagram are better handled by OCR than manual transcription in this triage pass.

blocks.text:
Security as the first parameter since multi-tenant code execution in mind
Fast boot times
Fast snapshots -> Just dump the entire guest memory
cloud-hypervisor isn't at the whim of Amazon's Firecracker.
Had hotplugging and snapshot restore when Arrakis started
gVisor possibly a good in-between option between Containers and MicroVMs
Based on the security guarantees needed
